MemberSignature.Value: public Azure.ResourceManager.ContainerService.Models.GpuManagementMode? ManagementMode { get; set; }
.property instance valuetype System.Nullable`1<valuetype Azure.ResourceManager.ContainerService.Models.GpuManagementMode> ManagementMode
Public Property ManagementMode As Nullable(Of GpuManagementMode)
member this.ManagementMode : Nullable<Azure.ResourceManager.ContainerService.Models.GpuManagementMode> with get, set

Docs.summary: The Managed GPU experience installs additional components, such as the Data Center GPU Manager (DCGM) metrics for monitoring, on top of the GPU driver for you. For more details of what is installed, check out aka.ms/aks/managed-gpu.

MemberSignature.Value: public Azure.ResourceManager.ContainerService.Models.MultiInstanceGpuStrategy? MigStrategy { get; set; }
.property instance valuetype System.Nullable`1<valuetype Azure.ResourceManager.ContainerService.Models.MultiInstanceGpuStrategy> MigStrategy
Public Property MigStrategy As Nullable(Of MultiInstanceGpuStrategy)
member this.MigStrategy : Nullable<Azure.ResourceManager.ContainerService.Models.MultiInstanceGpuStrategy> with get, set

Docs.summary: Sets the MIG (Multi-Instance GPU) strategy that will be used for managed MIG support. For more information about the different strategies, visit aka.ms/aks/managed-gpu. When not specified, the default is None.
